roadmap.explanation: Given Vikram's 11 years of experience in software engineering, his interest in EdTech, and his current burnout level, transitioning to a Technical Educator or Curriculum Developer role in EdTech is a suitable career move. This path aligns with his career goal, offers better work-life balance, and has a realistic growth trajectory. The transition will require developing pedagogical expertise, understanding learning outcomes measurement, and managing educator teams, but his technical background and leadership skills provide a solid foundation.

roadmap_nodes.description: Current role, utilizing technical skills and experience.
Start part-time as a Technical Educator to gain experience in EdTech, build a portfolio, and develop necessary skills.
Transition to a full-time role in EdTech, focusing on curriculum development and technical education.
Advance to a senior role, leading educator teams and contributing to the development of EdTech platforms.

roadmap_edges.label: 6 months of part-time tutoring or content creation
Portfolio development and application to EdTech companies
2 years of experience and skill development in EdTech

emotional_forecast.description: Initial transition period, focusing on recovery from burnout and adjusting to part-time EdTech role.
Developing necessary skills for full-time EdTech role, managing part-time and full-time responsibilities.
Established in EdTech, focusing on career growth, work-life balance, and contributing to the development of EdTech platforms.
